Petition For Order Approving Compromise Of Litigation And For Approval Of Attorney Contingent Fee
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-10-293915 Estate of Alberto Manjarres.

Appearances: Edward Broitman for Teresita Manjarres. John Boessenecker for Ben Gallo.

Mr. Boessenecker addressed the issue of his Attorney contingent fee agreement (litigation) not being pre-approved, and explained circumstances and services provided. The Court is approving both Petitions for Order Approving Compromise of Litigation (subject to review of the orders) but reserves the issue of fees. Mr. Boessenecker will submit a declaration regarding fees by the end of the week.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For Order Approving Compromise Of Litigation And For Approval Of Attorney Contingent Fee
